Description: Summon forth your shroud of Darkness, a lingering sliver of the Cloud of Darkness's eldritch raiment.
Description{Enhanced}: A sliver of the eldritch raiment worn by the Cloud of Darkness. Appearing to be perpetuated by residual aether, it shows no sign of dissipating and allows its wearer to fly freely. Though soft to the touch like the finest wool, the fog that clings to it results in a persistent clamminess.

Description: Summon forth your dais of Darkness. Will not vanish beneath your feet after a set duration.
Description{Enhanced}: A piece of the battlefield created by the Cloud of Darkness, upon which only those recognized by the being may set foot. While it has sent countless foes plummeting into endless void, by triumphing over its maker, you appear to have gained control over it.
Tooltip:
A well-maintained airship can mean
the difference between life and a
horrible, plummetin' death.
   - Redbill Engineer
